title: Fix Dark_Mellow stale release artifacts
description: Resolve TASK-059 required package review findings by removing or regenerating the stale root ZIP, replacing the contradictory legacy README.txt, and updating package docs so all user-visible install paths point to the current wallpaper-capable installer.
acceptance_criteria: The visible dated ZIP no longer ships the old installer without wallpaper handling
README.txt no longer contradicts README.md or current package contents
README.md clearly identifies the recommended install path and avoids pointing users at stale artifacts
Validation records archive contents or removal decision plus shell syntax checks
